name: Standard PCR Amplification

components.name: 1. 冰上配制反应体系 (做 master mix)
3. 琼脂糖凝胶验证
components.note: 取 5 µL + loading dye, 1–2% 琼脂糖凝胶

notes.en: Use Q5/Phusion for high-fidelity PCR (proofreading, 100× lower error rate). Tm calculator: NEB Tm Calculator (tmcalculator.neb.com). NTC (no template control) required. Multiple bands: reduce primer concentration, raise annealing temp, reduce cycles. Smear: optimize Mg²⁺. No product: lower annealing temp, increase template, check primer orientation. GC-rich templates: add 3-5% DMSO or GC enhancer.
notes.zh: 高保真 PCR 用 Q5/Phusion（校对功能, 错误率低 100×）。Tm 计算：NEB Tm Calculator (tmcalculator.neb.com)。无模板对照 (NTC) 必须。多条带：降低引物浓度、提高退火温度、减少循环数。涂片：优化 Mg²⁺ 浓度。无产物：降低退火温度、增加模板量、检查引物方向。GC-rich 模板加 3–5% DMSO 或用 GC enhancer。

ref: Saiki et al. (1988) Science 239:487; NEB PCR Protocol (neb.com)

materials.name: Template DNA (1–100 ng genomic or 0.1–10 ng plasmid)
Forward and reverse primers (10 µM each)

usage.en: Amplify specific DNA sequences using standard polymerase chain reaction (PCR).
usage.zh: 标准聚合酶链反应（PCR）扩增特定 DNA 序列。

briefSteps.en: Assemble reaction on ice (template + primers + master mix + water) → thermocycle (initial denaturation 95°C 3 min, 30–35 cycles of 95°C/Tm-5°C/72°C, final extension 72°C 5 min) → verify by agarose gel.
briefSteps.zh: 冰上配制反应体系（模板+引物+master mix+水）→ 热循环（初始变性 95°C 3 min，30–35 循环 95°C/Tm-5°C/72°C，终延伸 72°C 5 min）→ 琼脂糖凝胶验证。

detailedSteps.en: Prepare reaction master mix on ice: combine 25 µL 2× Taq Master Mix, 1 µL forward primer (10 µM, 0.2 µM final), 1 µL reverse primer (10 µM, 0.2 µM final), and 22 µL nuclease-free water per 50 µL reaction.
detailedSteps.zh: 冰上配制 master mix：每 50 µL 反应加入 25 µL 2× Taq Master Mix、1 µL 正向引物（10 µM，终浓度 0.2 µM）、1 µL 反向引物（10 µM，终浓度 0.2 µM）和 22 µL 无核酸酶水。

detailedSteps.en: Add 1 µL template DNA (1–100 ng genomic DNA or 0.1–10 ng plasmid). Mix gently and briefly centrifuge. Include a no-template control (NTC).
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 1 µL 模板 DNA（基因组 DNA 1–100 ng 或质粒 0.1–10 ng）。轻柔混匀后短暂离心。同时设无模板对照（NTC）。

detailedSteps.en: Run thermocycler program: initial denaturation 95°C for 3 min.
detailedSteps.zh: 运行热循环程序：初始变性 95°C，3 min。

detailedSteps.en: Cycle 30–35 times: denaturation 95°C for 30 s, annealing at Tm−5°C for 30 s, extension at 72°C for 1 min per kb of target.
detailedSteps.zh: 循环 30–35 次：变性 95°C 30 s，退火 Tm−5°C 30 s，延伸 72°C（每 kb 目标片段 1 min）。

detailedSteps.en: Final extension at 72°C for 5 min, then hold at 4°C.
detailedSteps.zh: 终末延伸 72°C 5 min，然后保持在 4°C。

detailedSteps.en: Mix 5 µL PCR product with 1 µL 6× DNA loading dye. Load onto a 1–2% agarose TAE gel alongside an appropriate DNA ladder.
detailedSteps.zh: 取 5 µL PCR 产物与 1 µL 6× DNA 上样缓冲液混合，与 DNA Ladder 一同上样至 1–2% 琼脂糖 TAE 凝胶。

detailedSteps.en: Run gel at 5–8 V/cm for 30–45 min. Visualize under UV or blue-light transilluminator and photograph. Confirm band at expected size.
detailedSteps.zh: 以 5–8 V/cm 跑胶 30–45 min。在紫外灯或蓝光灯下观察并拍照，确认目的条带大小正确。

note.en: PCR product can be stored at 4°C overnight or at −20°C for up to 1 week before gel analysis.
note.zh: PCR 产物可在 4°C 保存过夜，或在 −20°C 保存最多 1 周，再进行凝胶分析。
